productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Grey Stockings
description: Give everyday looks a sophisticated touch with this pair of grey stockings from united colors of benetton. The cotton-polyester blend ensures that the stocking stays snug on your legs and protects you from the winter chill.Team it with a short skirt for a sensational look.Stocking careMachine wash cold in not more than 30 degreesDo not dry cleanUse non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowDo not iron
